news.t: Bitwise Announces Monthly Distributions for IMST, ICOI, IMRA, IGME, ICRC, and IETH

Bitwise Launches Option Income ETF Suite, a Dynamic Active Approach to Covered Calls on MSTR, COIN, and MARA

overview.description: The Bitwise COIN Option Income Strategy ETF (ICOI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Coinbase Global Inc. stock (COIN) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys ICOI was launched on Apr 1, 2025 and is issued by Bitwise.
